message:
chore: rustfmt/clippy cleanup pass + gitignore scratch SQLite + wire ssi_abort_policy re-exports

Formatting and lint cleanup across recently-added MVCC and pager modules:

- Alphabetize pub mod declarations and re-export blocks in lib.rs
- Add pub use block for ssi_abort_policy (AbortDecision, ConformalCalibrator,
  SsiFpMonitor, select_victim, etc.)
- Collapse multi-line function calls and assertions to single lines where
  they fit (ssi_abort_policy tests, ssi_validation tests, witness_refinement)
- Reorder imports to match rustfmt StdExternalCrate style
- Fix test comment "page 5" → "page 10" to match actual CellBitmap test logic
- Remove redundant .clone() on last use of `original` in encrypt.rs decrypt_page
- Add storage.sqlite3 and its WAL/SHM sidecars to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 # they are required inputs for the spec-evolution visualization.
 
+# Local scratch SQLite DBs (never tracked)
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*

 .bv/
